# AI Tool Stack
> Free step-by-step guides to build AI tools that run your business. $3 AI assistant, AI video clones, image generators, writing engines. Zero coding required.

## Core Pages
- Home: https://zsch21425-del.github.io/ai-tool-stack/ — Full dashboard with all 7 free AI tool stacks
- Tutorials: https://zsch21425-del.github.io/ai-tool-stack/#assistant — Individual tool guides with step-by-step instructions

## Key Entity Information
- Brand: AI Tool Stack
- Founder: Zach S
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@ZachS-o3e4j
- GitHub: https://github.com/zsch21425-del/ai-tool-stack
- Founded: 2026
- Category: AI Tools, Education, Technology

## Content Sections
- /#assistant — $3 AI Assistant (Hermes Agent + DeepSeek)
- /#clone — AI Clone Studio (HeyGen + ElevenLabs)
- /#images — AI Image Studio (Leonardo AI + Photopea + Canva)
- /#video — AI Video Engine (CapCut + Descript)
- /#writing — AI Writing Engine (Claude + Jasper)
- /#passive — Passive Income Stack (Honeygain + EarnApp)
- /#gui-bot — GUI Automation Bot (Python + Gemini Vision)
